instructions: नीचे दिए गए Hindi sentences को English में translate करें। यह revision Day 1-9 तक के सभी topics को cover करता है।

questions.hindi: मैं चाय पीता हूँ।
वह खाना खाती है।
questions.explanation: She/He/It के साथ verb+s लगता है।

questions.hindi: हम रोज़ पढ़ते हैं।
questions.explanation: We के साथ base verb आता है।

questions.hindi: वे क्रिकेट खेलते हैं।
questions.explanation: Plural subject के साथ base verb।

questions.hindi: वह ऑफिस जाता है।
questions.explanation: Go का He/She/It form 'goes' होता है।

questions.hindi: क्या तुम English पढ़ते हो?
क्या वह गाना गाती है?
questions.explanation: She के साथ Does आता है, base verb नहीं बदलता।

questions.hindi: मैं खाना नहीं खाता।
वह दूध नहीं पीती।
सूरज पूर्व से उगता है।
questions.english: The sun rises in the east.
questions.explanation: Facts और truths के लिए simple present।

questions.hindi: मेरी माँ रोज़ सुबह योगा करती है।
questions.english: My mother does yoga every morning.
alternatives: my mom does yoga every morning.

questions.hindi: बच्चे बाहर खेलते हैं।
वे हर दिन ऑफिस जाते हैं।
questions.english: They go to the office every day.

questions.hindi: वह हर शाम gym जाता है।
questions.english: He goes to the gym every evening.
alternatives: he goes to gym every evening.

questions.hindi: हम सब मिलकर काम करते हैं।
क्या वे Hindi बोलते हैं?
questions.explanation: Plural question: Do + they + base verb।

questions.hindi: मैं टीवी नहीं देखता।
वह कभी झूठ नहीं बोलता।
मैं अक्सर किताबें पढ़ता हूँ।
questions.explanation: Frequency adverb: often subject के बाद।

questions.hindi: वह हमेशा समय पर आती है।
मेरा नाम राहुल है।
questions.explanation: Introduction: My name is... हमेशा 'is' आता है।

questions.hindi: मैं दिल्ली से हूँ।
questions.explanation: शहर बताने के लिए: I am from + city।

questions.hindi: मैं एक software engineer हूँ।
questions.explanation: Profession बताने के लिए: I am a/an + job।

questions.hindi: मुझे cricket पसंद है।
मैं TCS में काम करता हूँ।
questions.explanation: Company: work at या work for + company।

questions.hindi: मेरे परिवार में 4 लोग हैं।
questions.english: There are 4 people in my family.
questions.explanation: Family members बताने का common way।
questions.grammarRule: There are [number] people in my family

questions.hindi: मैं पिछले 3 साल से यहाँ काम कर रहा हूँ।
questions.english: I have been working here for 3 years.
questions.hint: I have been + verb+ing + for + time
questions.grammarRule: I have been + verb+ing + for + time

questions.hindi: मैं दिल्ली का रहने वाला हूँ।
questions.explanation: Belong to = का रहने वाला हूँ।

questions.hindi: आपसे मिलकर बहुत खुशी हुई।
alternatives: it's a pleasure to meet you.

questions.hindi: मेरी hobby photography है।
मैं IT sector में काम करता हूँ।
questions.english: I work in the IT sector.

questions.hindi: मैंने B.Tech किया है।
मुझे reading का बहुत शौक है।
questions.english: I am very fond of reading.

questions.hindi: मेरी उम्र 25 साल है।
मैं freshly graduate हूँ।
questions.explanation: New graduate के लिए standard phrase।

questions.hindi: दरवाज़ा बंद करो।
questions.explanation: Imperative: base verb से शुरू करो।

questions.hindi: यहाँ बैठो।
शोर मत करो।
कृपया अंदर आइए।
चलो बाज़ार चलते हैं।
alternatives: let us go to the market.
questions.explanation: Suggestion: Let's = Let us + base verb।

questions.hindi: जल्दी करो।
देर मत करो।
कृपया यहाँ sign करें।
हमेशा सच बोलो।
चलो एक break लेते हैं।
कृपया phone बंद कर दें।
धूम्रपान मत करो।
कड़ी मेहनत करो।
चलो cricket खेलते हैं।
अपना काम खुद करो।
मैं खुश हूँ।
वह एक डॉक्टर है।
हम सब तैयार हैं।
वे बहुत थके हुए हैं।
कल मौसम बहुत ठंडा था।
questions.english: Yesterday the weather was very cold.
alternatives: the weather was very cold yesterday.

questions.hindi: वे लोग बाज़ार में थे।
क्या तुम कल घर पर थे?
मैं ठीक नहीं था।
वह एक अच्छी teacher है।
क्या वह अभी available है?
हम office में हैं।
वे बच्चे नहीं हैं।
वह मेरी बहन है।
questions.explanation: Relationship बताना: She is + my/his/her + noun।

questions.hindi: मैं बचपन में बहुत शरारती था।
questions.english: I was very naughty in childhood.
alternatives: i used to be naughty in childhood.

questions.hindi: क्या वे students हैं?
यह मेरी किताब है।
वह उसका pen है।
ये मेरे दोस्त हैं।
वे उसके shoes हैं।
यह एक अच्छा idea है।
वह गलत है।
ये सब मेरी files हैं।
वे लोग कौन हैं?
questions.explanation: Those = वे (plural, far)। Question with Those।

questions.hindi: यह ticket कितने का है?
alternatives: how much does this ticket cost?
questions.explanation: Price पूछना: How much is this।

questions.hindi: वे दिन बहुत अच्छे थे।
यह मेरी problem नहीं है।
वह restaurant बहुत महंगा है।
questions.explanation: That modifies the noun (not a pronoun here)।

questions.hindi: ये सेब मीठे हैं।
वे shoes मुझे पसंद हैं।
यह काम बहुत मुश्किल है।
मेरे पास एक नई car है।
उसके पास 5 साल का experience है।
alternatives: she has five years of experience.

questions.hindi: मैंने अपना काम पूरा कर लिया है।
वह पहले ही जा चुकी है।
क्या तुमने report submit की?
questions.explanation: Present Perfect Question: Have + you + V3।

questions.hindi: उसके पास laptop नहीं है।
हमारे पास एक meeting है।
मैंने यह movie पहले देखी है।
questions.english: I have seen this movie before.

questions.hindi: उसने अभी तक नहीं खाया है।
मेरे पास MBA की degree है।
क्या उसके पास driving licence है?
questions.english: Does he have a driving license?

questions.hindi: हमने project deadline miss की है।
questions.english: We have missed the project deadline.

questions.hindi: क्या उसने email भेजी है?
मेरे पास समय नहीं है।
उसके पास बहुत talent है।
questions.english: She has a lot of talent.
questions.hint: She + has + a lot of + uncountable noun
questions.explanation: Uncountable noun के साथ a lot of।

questions.hindi: मेरे पास पहले एक पुरानी cycle थी।
questions.english: I had an old cycle before.
alternatives: i used to have an old cycle.
questions.explanation: Past possession: I had = मेरे पास था।

questions.hindi: वह बचपन में बहुत होशियार था।
questions.english: He was very smart in childhood.
alternatives: he had been very smart as a child.

questions.hindi: जब मैं पहुँचा, वह जा चुका था।
questions.english: He had already left when I arrived.
alternatives: by the time i arrived, he had left.
questions.explanation: Past Perfect: had + V3, earlier past action।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + had + V3 + when + Simple Past

questions.hindi: मैंने खाना खाने से पहले हाथ धो लिए थे।
questions.english: I had washed my hands before eating.
alternatives: i had cleaned my hands before eating.
questions.explanation: before clause के साथ Past Perfect।

questions.hindi: क्या तुम्हारे पास पहले bike थी?
questions.english: Did you have a bike before?
alternatives: did you used to have a bike?

questions.hindi: उसके पास काम नहीं था।
मैंने meeting से पहले report complete कर ली थी।
questions.english: I had completed the report before the meeting.
alternatives: i had finished the report before the meeting.

questions.hindi: वे बचपन में साथ खेलते थे।
questions.english: They had played together as children.
questions.explanation: Past Perfect for earlier past event।

questions.hindi: क्या उसने पहले यह project किया था?
questions.english: Had he done this project before?
alternatives: had he worked on this project before?

questions.hindi: मेरे पास बड़े सपने थे।
उसने train छूटने से पहले ticket ले लिया था।
questions.english: He had bought the ticket before the train left.
alternatives: he had gotten the ticket before the train left.
questions.explanation: Two past actions: earlier one = Past Perfect।

questions.hindi: उनके पास पहले एक बड़ी company थी।
questions.english: They had a big company before.
alternatives: they used to have a big company.

questions.hindi: मैंने उससे पहले कभी नहीं मिला था।
questions.english: I had never met him before.
alternatives: i had never seen him before.

questions.hindi: वह कल meeting में आई थी।
questions.english: She had attended the meeting yesterday.

questions.hindi: क्या आपके पास पहले कोई internship experience था?
questions.english: Did you have any internship experience before?
alternatives: had you done any internship before?

questions.hindi: कल तक मैं report submit कर चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: By tomorrow, I will have submitted the report.
alternatives: by tomorrow, i'll have submitted the report.
questions.hint: By + time + Subject + will have + V3

questions.hindi: अगले साल तक वह MBA पूरी कर चुकी होगी।
questions.english: By next year, she will have completed her MBA.
alternatives: by next year, she'll have finished her mba.
questions.hint: By next year + will have + V3
questions.explanation: Future Perfect with by next year।
questions.grammarRule: By next year + she + will have + V3

questions.hindi: शाम तक, हम सब घर पहुँच चुके होंगे।
questions.english: By evening, we will all have reached home.
alternatives: by evening, we'll all have arrived home.

questions.hindi: deadline तक मैं यह नहीं कर पाऊँगा।
questions.english: I won't have finished this by the deadline.
alternatives: i will not have completed this by the deadline.
questions.hint: Subject + won't have + V3 + by deadline

questions.hindi: क्या तुम Friday तक assignment submit कर लोगे?
questions.english: Will you have submitted the assignment by Friday?
alternatives: will you have finished the assignment by friday?
questions.hint: Will + you + have + V3 + by Friday?

questions.hindi: जब तक तुम पहुँचोगे, खाना बन चुका होगा।
questions.english: By the time you arrive, the food will have been cooked.
alternatives: the food will be ready by the time you arrive.
questions.hint: By the time + Simple Present + will have + V3
questions.explanation: By the time clause with Future Perfect।

questions.hindi: 2030 तक, technology बहुत बदल चुकी होगी।
questions.english: By 2030, technology will have changed a lot.
alternatives: by 2030, technology will have evolved greatly.

questions.hindi: Q4 तक हम target achieve कर चुके होंगे।
questions.english: By Q4, we will have achieved our target.
alternatives: by the end of q4, we'll have hit our target.
questions.grammarRule: By Q4 + we + will have + V3

questions.hindi: जब तक तुम join करोगे, project शुरू हो चुका होगा।
questions.english: By the time you join, the project will have started.
alternatives: the project will have begun by the time you start.
questions.hint: By the time + Future Simple → Future Perfect
questions.explanation: Joining date से पहले का काम।
questions.grammarRule: By the time + [clause] + will have + V3

questions.hindi: इस साल के अंत तक मैं 30 साल का हो जाऊँगा।
questions.english: By the end of this year, I will have turned 30.
alternatives: i will have turned 30 by the end of this year.
questions.hint: By the end of + year + will have + V3
questions.grammarRule: By the end of + [time] + will have + V3

questions.hindi: वह meeting शुरू होने से पहले आ चुकी होगी।
questions.english: She will have arrived before the meeting starts.
alternatives: she'll have come before the meeting begins.
questions.hint: will have + V3 + before + Simple Present

questions.hindi: क्या वह 5 बजे तक काम खत्म कर चुकी होगी?
questions.english: Will she have finished work by 5 PM?
alternatives: will she have completed work by 5?
questions.hint: Will + she + have + V3 + by time?

questions.hindi: अगले महीने तक, मैं यह course पूरा कर चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: By next month, I will have completed this course.
alternatives: i'll have finished this course by next month.
questions.hint: By next month + will have + V3
questions.grammarRule: By next month + I + will have + V3

questions.hindi: वे इस project में 2 साल काम कर चुके होंगे।
questions.english: By then, they will have worked on this project for 2 years.
alternatives: they'll have been on this project for 2 years by then.
questions.hint: By then + will have + V3 + duration
questions.grammarRule: By then + will have + V3 + for + [time]

questions.hindi: मैं अगले साल तक 10 देश घूम चुका होऊँगा।
questions.english: By next year, I will have visited 10 countries.
alternatives: i'll have traveled to 10 countries by next year.
questions.hint: By next year + will have + V3 + quantity
questions.grammarRule: By next year + I + will have + V3

questions.hindi: मेज़ पर एक किताब है।
questions.english: There is a book on the table.
alternatives: there's a book on the table.
questions.explanation: There is = एक चीज़ है। Singular noun।

questions.hindi: कमरे में 3 कुर्सियाँ हैं।
questions.english: There are 3 chairs in the room.
alternatives: there are three chairs in the room.
questions.explanation: There are = plural noun के लिए।

questions.hindi: पार्क में कोई लोग नहीं हैं।
questions.english: There are no people in the park.
alternatives: there aren't any people in the park.

questions.hindi: क्या पास में कोई hospital है?
alternatives: is there a hospital near here?

questions.hindi: उस गाँव में एक बड़ी नदी थी।
questions.english: There was a big river in that village.
alternatives: there was a large river in that village.
questions.explanation: Past: There was = एक चीज़ थी।

questions.hindi: पुराने दिनों में यहाँ कई पेड़ थे।
questions.english: There were many trees here in the old days.
alternatives: there used to be many trees here.

questions.hindi: कल meeting में कोई समस्या नहीं थी।
questions.english: There was no problem in the meeting yesterday.
alternatives: there wasn't any problem in the meeting.

questions.hindi: अगले हफ्ते एक बड़ी conference होगी।
questions.english: There will be a big conference next week.
alternatives: there's going to be a big conference next week.

questions.hindi: क्या शहर में कोई मेट्रो station है?
questions.english: Is there a metro station in the city?
alternatives: are there metro stations in the city?

questions.hindi: पिछले 5 साल में बहुत बदलाव आए हैं।
questions.english: There have been many changes in the last 5 years.
alternatives: there has been a lot of change in the last 5 years.
questions.hint: There have been + plural noun + time

questions.hindi: मेरी बात में कोई शक नहीं है।
questions.english: There is no doubt about what I said.
questions.explanation: Fixed expression: There is no doubt।

questions.hindi: क्या कल meeting है?
alternatives: will there be a meeting tomorrow?

questions.hindi: घर में पाँच लोग रहते हैं।
questions.english: There are five people living in the house.
alternatives: five people live in the house.

questions.hindi: क्या वहाँ कोई problem थी?
इस topic पर और जानकारी नहीं है।
questions.english: There is no more information on this topic.
alternatives: there isn't any more information on this.

questions.hindi: मेरे पास 3 साल का experience है और मैं further grow करना चाहता हूँ।
questions.english: I have 3 years of experience and I want to grow further.
alternatives: i've got 3 years of experience and wish to grow further.
questions.grammarRule: I have + [experience] + and + I want + to + [verb]

questions.hindi: वहाँ एक office है जहाँ 50 लोग काम करते हैं।
questions.english: There is an office where 50 people work.

questions.hindi: क्या उसके पास था जो उसने खो दिया?
questions.english: Did she have what she lost?
alternatives: did she have something that she lost?

questions.hindi: अगले साल तक, वहाँ एक नया school बन चुका होगा।
questions.english: By next year, there will have been a new school built there.
alternatives: by next year, a new school will have been built there.
questions.hint: By next year + there will have been
questions.grammarRule: By [time] + there will have been + [noun] + V3

questions.hindi: वह बहुत थका हुआ था क्योंकि उसने पूरी रात काम किया था।
questions.english: He was very tired because he had worked all night.
alternatives: he was exhausted because he had worked throughout the night.

questions.hindi: उस room में 5 tables थीं और हर table पर एक laptop था।
questions.english: There were 5 tables in that room and there was a laptop on each table.
alternatives: that room had 5 tables, each with a laptop.
questions.hint: There were + noun + and + There was

questions.hindi: कल तक मेरा काम हो जाएगा और मैं free हो जाऊँगा।
questions.english: By tomorrow, I will have finished my work and I will be free.
alternatives: by tomorrow i'll have done my work and be free.
questions.hint: By tomorrow + will have + V3 + and + will be
questions.grammarRule: By [time] + will have + V3 + and + will be + [state]

questions.hindi: Please यहाँ बैठो — यहाँ बहुत space है।
questions.english: Please sit here — there is plenty of space here.
alternatives: please sit here, there's a lot of space.

questions.hindi: क्या उसके पास था जो वह interview में बताने वाला था?
questions.english: Did he have what he was going to say in the interview?
alternatives: did he have his interview answers ready?

questions.hindi: मेरा नाम Priya है, मैं एक teacher हूँ, और मेरे पास 5 साल का experience है।
questions.english: My name is Priya, I am a teacher, and I have 5 years of experience.
alternatives: i'm priya, a teacher with 5 years of experience.
questions.hint: My name is + I am + I have (Introduction + Be Verb + Have)
questions.explanation: Complete self-introduction using Day 2 + Day 4 + Day 6।
questions.grammarRule: My name is + [name] + I am + [noun] + I have + [experience]

questions.hindi: वे बहुत खुश थे क्योंकि वहाँ बहुत सारी activities थीं।
questions.english: They were very happy because there were so many activities.
alternatives: they were happy as there were a lot of activities.

questions.hindi: कल तक वहाँ एक नई building बन चुकी होगी।
questions.english: By tomorrow, there will have been a new building constructed.
alternatives: a new building will have been built there by tomorrow.
questions.hint: By tomorrow + there will have been
questions.grammarRule: By [time] + there will have been + [noun] + V3

questions.hindi: Please शांत रहो — यहाँ बहुत शांत रहना ज़रूरी है।
questions.english: Please be quiet — there is a need to be calm here.
alternatives: please be quiet — it's necessary to stay calm here.
questions.hint: Please be + adjective — there is + noun

questions.hindi: ये वे documents हैं जो उसने कल prepare किए थे।
questions.english: These are the documents that he had prepared yesterday.
alternatives: these are the papers he had prepared yesterday.
questions.hint: These are + noun + that + Past Perfect

questions.hindi: वहाँ कोई नहीं था जब मैं पहुँचा।
questions.english: There was nobody there when I arrived.
alternatives: nobody was there when i arrived.
questions.hint: There was nobody + when + Simple Past
questions.explanation: There was no one + time clause।

questions.hindi: क्या उसके पास वह skill थी जो इस job के लिए ज़रूरी थी?
questions.english: Did she have the skill that was required for this job?
alternatives: did she possess the required skill for this job?
questions.hint: Did + she + have + noun + that + was

questions.hindi: इस तरह के कदम उठाओ जिससे आगे कोई problem न हो।
questions.english: Take steps like this so that there are no problems in the future.
alternatives: take such steps so that there won't be any problems later.
questions.hint: Take + steps + so that + there are no

questions.hindi: वह आज बहुत busy है क्योंकि उसके पास बहुत काम है।
questions.english: She is very busy today because she has a lot of work.
alternatives: she's busy because she has too much work.
questions.hint: Is + busy + because + has + a lot of

questions.hindi: जब तक meeting शुरू हो, सब लोग तैयार हो जाएंगे।
questions.english: By the time the meeting starts, everyone will have been ready.
alternatives: everyone will be ready by the time the meeting begins.
questions.hint: By the time + Simple Present + will have been
questions.grammarRule: By the time + [clause] + will have + V3

questions.hindi: क्या तुम मुझे बता सकते हो कि वहाँ कितने लोग थे?
questions.english: Can you tell me how many people were there?
alternatives: could you tell me how many people were there?
questions.hint: Can you + tell + me + how many + were there
questions.grammarRule: Can you + tell + me + how many + [noun] + were there?
